## Summary

Describe the problem this change solves and the main outcome.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

Describe how you tested or validated the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] My change is focused and limited in scope
- [ ] I updated docs if needed
- [ ] I added or updated tests if needed
- [ ] I confirmed there is no known security-sensitive information in this PR
